objective: Verify and close the session guardrail reliability and self-learning epic after all child sprints are merged and closed.
scope_boundary: Audit GitHub child issue state and closing PRs for #534, #535, #536, #537, #538, and #541.
Record final epic closeout evidence in governance-owned docs and raw artifacts.
Update governance progress to show the #533 epic is complete.
Do not mutate downstream product repositories.
out_of_scope: Creating new downstream adoption issues unless the closeout audit finds a missing issue-backed residual.
research_summary: GitHub shows all tracked #533 child sprints closed by merged PRs: #538/#543, #541/#544, #536/#545, #535/#547, #537/#548, and #534/#551. Repo evidence exists for each child under docs/plans, raw/execution-scopes, raw/handoffs, raw/validation, raw/closeouts, and raw/operator-context/self-learning where applicable.

sprints.name: Epic closeout audit
sprints.goal: Confirm the #533 acceptance criteria are satisfied by merged child sprint evidence and close the epic.
tasks: Audit all child issue states and closing PR references.
Confirm child validation and closeout artifacts exist.
Record the final epic closeout and validation artifact.
Run governance closeout, handoff, execution-scope, provisioning, diff, and Local CI validators.
acceptance_criteria: All child issues are closed by merged PRs.
All observed non-product-signal error categories map to guardrails, procedures, or explicit accepted risk.
No child closes with documentation-only evidence where deterministic prevention was feasible.
Final epic closeout links child evidence and validation.
Issue #533 can close without unresolved child acceptance criteria.

specialist_reviews.focus: Child issue closure, evidence completeness, and residual-risk routing
specialist_reviews.summary: The child sprint set is closed and has repo-local validation and closeout artifacts. No additional implementation child is required before #533 closeout.

alternate_model_review.summary: This is an evidence-only epic closeout over already merged child implementations; no new guardrail implementation or standards baseline change is introduced.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implementation may update #533 closeout evidence and docs/PROGRESS.md only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run validation, open PR, merge after green checks, and close issue #533.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: Final #533 closeout validates locally and through Local CI.

material_deviation_rules: If any child issue is open, stop and route that child instead of closing #533.
If validation finds missing evidence, add or repair the missing issue-backed artifact before closeout.
If downstream repo work is needed, open product-repo follow-up issues rather than mutating downstream repos from this lane.
